name: Legal Process & Research Services

overview: Legal research, drafting and process work for global firms — law's back office. Legal Process & Research Services sits in the Legal Practice family of Law, Government & Public Policy. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.

faqs: What does Legal Process & Research Services pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on English, Polity. Typical degrees: LLB, B.A. + paralegal training. Alternatives exist: 3-year llb after any degree.
Will AI take over this career?

AI impact is moderate — routine parts will be automated; the judgement stays human. Broad paths like Legal Process & Research Services evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Legal Process & Research Services is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
